loop_gap_note: RUN 85: 2.17h gap from Run84. 0 new fixes. BLOCKED: TP1->_FULL_CLOSE (semantic error — TP1 is partial close). NEW finding: TP1_CUMULATIVE_PNL_INSTRUMENTATION needed.

block_log.finding: TP1 is a PARTIAL close (position_manager.py:73 tp1_close_pct=0.5). Adding TP1 to _FULL_CLOSE would cause feedback systems to record a full-close outcome while 50% of the position is still in trailing mode. Corrupts all 7 feedback learning loops.
block_log.correct_fix: Accumulate partial_close_pnl in position object at TP1 hit. When trailing stop fires, pass total_pnl = partial_close_pnl + trailing_pnl to record_outcome().

pending_code_implementations.description: New finding Run85: Store partial_close_pnl on position object at TP1 hit. Pass cumulative total to all 7 record_outcome() calls at trailing close. Fixes $61/trade feedback underestimation on 111 trailing exits/100d.
Lock 70% TP1 gain as trailing floor in position_manager.py:1244. env_var: TRAILING_MIN_LOCK_PCT=0.70.
Add pytest for graduated rule condition matching.
